---
pagetitle: "Stan Q. He | Business Analytics"
description: "Stan Q. He is an MSBA candidate at UC San Diego focused on business analytics, product experimentation, and decision intelligence."
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.landing}
<!-- Keep the profile stack independent from the introduction grid. -->
:::: {.profile-details}
::: {.profile-column}
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stanqhe/assets/main/profile/avatar_coastal-light.jpeg){.profile-image fig-alt="Stan Q. He"}
:::

::: {.identity-block}
::: {.focus-line}
[MSBA Candidate at UC San Diego]{.bio-lead}

Exploring business analytics, product strategy, and AI-enabled <span class="bio-tail">transformation for better digital life</span>
:::
:::

::: {.contact-links aria-label="Contact links"}
[<i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i><span class="visually-hidden">GitHub</span>](https://github.com/stanqhe){.contact-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i><span class="visually-hidden">LinkedIn</span>](https://www.linkedin.com/in/stanqhe){.contact-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i><span class="visually-hidden">Email</span>](mailto:stan.q.he@outlook.com){.contact-link}
[<i class="bi bi-twitter-x" aria-hidden="true"></i><span class="visually-hidden">X</span>](https://x.com/stanqhe){.contact-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[<i class="bi bi-instagram" aria-hidden="true"></i><span class="visually-hidden">Instagram</span>](https://www.instagram.com/stanqhe/){.contact-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
::::

::: {.intro-column}
I work at the intersection of business analytics, product strategy, and AI-enabled transformation.

As a Master of Science in Business Analytics candidate at UC San Diego, I focus on turning business ambiguity into clearer decisions through analytics, experimentation, and decision-oriented modeling. My interests sit where data, product thinking, and AI-assisted workflows help organizations connect strategy, systems, and execution.

Before graduate school, I gained experience in Big Four advisory environments, building a foundation in structured problem-solving, analytical decision-making, and business communication.

My professional direction centers on analytics, product strategy, and transformation, where rigorous thinking, technical fluency, and thoughtful communication can create practical business impact.

This site brings together my projects and writing, along with moments from life beyond work and study. From daylight vibe to midnight swag, it records a meaningful life across endless time.

:::
:::
